meta.title: SmartPliegos · Intelligence for public tenders
meta.description: Smart search across 288,000 PLACE tenders, real-time alerts and AI summaries of 100+ page tender documents in seconds.

hero.sub: Smart search, tailored alerts in real time and AI summaries of 100+ page tender documents in 15 seconds. All on Spain's public procurement platform (PLACE).

head.intro: Tools built for companies that compete for real contracts. No noise, no useless dashboards, no learning curve.

search.p: Filter 288,000 PLACE tenders by CPV, region, contracting body, amount and status. Instant results, real relevance.
search.b1: Combinable filters by CPV, region, body and amount
search.b2: Semantic search that understands what you mean
search.b3: Save searches and turn them into alerts

alerts.h: Let the tenders come to you.
alerts.p: Set your criteria once and get an email the moment a matching tender appears. No checking portals every morning.

ai.h: 100 pages of tender docs, read in 15 seconds.
ai.p: Upload a tender document and get a structured summary: scope, amount, deadlines, award criteria and solvency requirements. Decide whether to bid in a minute, not an afternoon.
ai.b1: Scope, amount and deadlines extracted automatically
ai.b3: Ask the document questions in plain language

head.intro: Administrative tender documents aren't made to be read fast. SmartPliegos' AI digests them for you and gives you only what matters to decide.
Start free, no card. Move up to Pro when you need it and top up AI credits on demand.

free.name: Free
free.desc: To try it out. No card.

credits.name: AI credits
credits.desc: Running out of your plan's? Top up anytime.
credits.f2: Added on top of your plan's

final.sub: No card. No commitment. Official PLACE data updated every 5 minutes.

footer.tag: Intelligence for public tenders. Built on official data from Spain's public procurement platform (PLACE).
